title: GUERRERO PARK - San Jose Ave, San Francisco, California - Yelp
content: Definitely NOT a park but I will concede it's a very nice plaza. You want to come out enjoy the day, have lunch, hangout and chitchat this is the place

title: Tortuguero National Park and Canals Day Trip from San Jose

title: PANORAMA PARK - San Francisco, California - Yelp
content: Overall this park is great for a brief Sunday stroll or another stop to add to your cycling route--but it also feels like tourist spot to snap pics and leave.
